MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Diana Padilla.
Sydney E. Fairbairn, Esq. for Plaintiff: CIT Technology Financial.
Order waiving live testimony granted and signed in open court.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Donna Compaglia Inc. dba FACS; Donna E. Compaglia, guarantor as follows:
Damages $46,525.75
Prejudgment Interest $11,959.50
Costs $364.50, for a total of $58,849.75
Judgment signed in open court.
